name: Cups
subtitle: Minor Arcana (Full Correspondences)
summary: Pure potential of Water, root of the suit. Origin essence — the {flow_noun} offered by the unseen.
flowText: Ace of Cups is the cup of water — Origin essence — the {flow_noun} offered by the unseen.

overview.label: Essence
overview.value: Pure potential of Water · root of the suit. Origin essence — the {flow_noun} offered by the unseen.

overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: II High Priestess · XVIII The Moon

related.name: Page of Cups
related.teaser: Page of Cups is the cup of water — Beginner’s mind; bring news and curiosity.

related.name: Two of Cups
related.teaser: Two of Cups is the cup of water — Dual currents finding rhythm.

related.name: Five of Cups
related.teaser: Five of Cups is the cup of water — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: Nine of Cups
related.teaser: Nine of Cups is the cup of water — Satisfaction and sovereignty; inner harvest.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Four of Cups
related.teaser: Four of Cups is the cup of water — Structure and rest; beware stagnation.

related.name: Queen of Cups
related.teaser: Queen of Cups is the cup of water — Contain and cultivate; depth with discernment.

related.name: Seven of Cups
related.teaser: Seven of Cups is the cup of water — Assess motive; clarity over confusion.

related.name: Three of Cups
related.teaser: Three of Cups is the cup of water — Creation takes shape; teamwork with the element.

related.name: Eight of Cups
related.teaser: Eight of Cups is the cup of water — Skill and dedication; steady refinement.

related.name: Knight of Cups
related.teaser: Knight of Cups is the cup of water — Drive and journey; steer the force wisely.

related.name: Ten of Cups
related.teaser: Ten of Cups is the cup of water — Completion and consequence; passing the mantle.
